description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden drafting or writing desk with a rectangular top and a single drawer beneath the main surface. The desk features a hinged back compartment lined with red felt, containing writing and drawing instruments such as a quill, ink pot, ruler, and set square. The main work surface is covered with papers and drawing tools, and there is an extendable side leaf for additional workspace. The legs are straight and sturdy, connected by horizontal supports for stability. The wood has a natural, lightly finished appearance, and the overall design suggests a utilitarian yet classic style suitable for focused tasks.
description: A tall, narrow wooden drafting or writing desk with a hinged back compartment, drawer, and extendable side leaf, featuring classic design and drawing tools on its surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main work surface, drawer, red-lined compartment with writing tools, and the extended side leaf.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk, the raised back compartment, and the side leaf's extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain wooden back, the side leaf, and the structure of the legs and supports.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the main surface, the open compartment, and the arrangement of drawing tools and papers.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawer and main work surface, featuring the red-lined compartment and extendable leaf, is intended to face the user; this is the functional front of the desk.
attribute_usage_context: drafting or writing station for artistic or technical work
